reviews.comment:
Pasamos de viaje a la madrugada y paramos a llenar el tanque y pasar al baño. Pero no nos dejaron entrar sino hasta las 7.30hs. Usar el baño es un derecho humano básico y encima si consumís algo en el lugar. Me pareció indignante...

(Translated by Google)
We were driving through in the early morning and stopped to fill up the tank and use the restroom. But they wouldn't let us in until 7:30 a.m. Using the restroom is a basic human right, especially if you've bought something there. I found it outrageous...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/8983193634567568949/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURYa0phSmRnEAE
